case_title: ABRAHAM, VINETTA C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES VS ASIAN AMERICAN RECOVERY SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM, VINETTA  C/O PRISONER LEGAL SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ASIAN AMERICAN RECOVERY SERVICES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
